Words: 谁？...楼下出了大事...有点可怕...
Who?... Something big happened downstairs... It's a bit scary...
又是您？我...我刚才都说过了...
You again? I... I already told you everything...
私家侦探，Zack Brennan。……你是谁？这么晚了，在这里做什么？
Private detective, Zack Brennan... Who are you? And what are you doing here so late?
您...您又来了？我之前都已经告诉您了...
You... you're back? I already told you everything...
Rosa，我需要再问你几个问题。
Rosa, I need to ask you a few more questions.
Brennan先生...您...您又来了？我...我之前都已经告诉您了...
Mr. Brennan... You... you're here again? I... I already told you everything before...
这么早就开始工作了，Tommy？
Starting work so early, Tommy?
Brennan先生？您...您又来了？我...我说的够多了吧...
Mr. Brennan? You... you're here again? I... I've said enough, haven't I...
Vivian女士，我需要问您几个问题。
Ms. Vivian, I need to ask you a few questions.
你还想听什么？我没什么好说的了。
What else do you want to hear? I have nothing more to say.
Morrison？你在这做什么？
Morrison? What are you doing here?
Morrison？你在这做什么？
Morrison? What are you doing here?
Rosa，我需要再问你一些细节。
Rosa, I need to ask you some more details.
Brennan先生...您...您又来了？我...我之前都告诉您了...
Mr. Brennan... You... you're here again? I... I told you everything before...
晚上好，Vivian。希望你还记得我——那个今天凑巧死里逃生的私家侦探。
Good evening, Vivian. Hope you still remember me—the private detective who coincidentally escaped death today.
你还想听什么？我没什么好说的了。
What else do you want to hear? I have nothing more to say.
Tommy，我需要问你一些关于Webb的事。
Tommy, I need to ask you some things about Webb.
Brennan先生...您...您又来了？我...我之前都告诉您了...
Mr. Brennan... You... you're here again? I... I told you everything before...
Brennan先生……我能帮什么忙吗？我现在就在拖地，我...我还要赶着去清理大堂...您知道的，周末客人多，地板总是很脏...
Mr. Brennan... can I help you? I'm mopping... gotta clean the lobby... you know, busy weekend, dirty floors...
Brennan先生...您...您又来了？我...我之前都告诉您了...
Mr. Brennan... You... you're here again? I... I told you everything before...
...这笔账不对...那个也不对...
...This entry is wrong... that one too...
Brennan先生...您...您又来了？我...我之前都告诉您了...
Mr. Brennan... You... you're here again? I... I told you everything before...
又是你。我是不是得把化妆室租给你？按小时收费，还是包月？
You again. Should I rent out my dressing room to you? Hourly rate, or monthly subscription?
你还想听什么？我没什么好说的了。
What else do you want to hear? I have nothing more to say.
你好，我是Zack Brennan，在调查Webb先生的案子。你是这里的厨师？
Hello, I'm Zack Brennan, investigating the Webb case. Are you the cook here?
Brennan先生...您又来了？我之前都告诉您了...
Mr. Brennan... You're here again? I told you everything before...
这么早？看来这一行的勤奋程度比我想象的要高。
So early? Seems diligence in this industry is higher than I imagined.
又是你？Brennan先生，你还想听什么？我没什么好说的了。
You again? Mr. Brennan, what else do you want to hear? I've got nothing more to say.
...这笔账不对...那个也不对...
...This entry is wrong... that one too...
Brennan...Brennan先生...您...您又来了？我...我之前都说了...
Mr. Brennan... y-you're here again? I... I told you everything before...
你也知道Webb惹了不该惹的人。既然这么危险，为什么还留在他身边？
You know Webb messed with the wrong people. If it's so dangerous, why stay with him?
又是您？Brennan先生，我该说的都说过了...
You again? Mr. Brennan, I've already said everything I know...
Vivian，还有个细节需要确认。
Vivian, there is one more detail I need to confirm.
Brennan先生，您这是第几次来了？我真的没什么可说的了。
Mr. Brennan, how many times is this now? I really have nothing left to say.
就是现在了，Emma。Morrison给的三天期限……只剩下这最后一个晚上了。
This is it, Emma. The three days Morrison gave us... we only have this last night left.
Brennan先生...Miss O'Malley...你们怎么会来这里？
Mr. Brennan... Miss O'Malley... Why are you here?
